$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for bugfix-agent responses (Story 7.2-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: BugfixAgentResponse
description: Structured result returned by a bugfix agent dispatched by the orchestrator.

failure_category.description: Failure classification (bugfix-agent vocabulary CODE_BUG/TEST_BUG/ENV_ISSUE, plus orchestrator routing categories).

issue_number.description: GitHub issue the agent opened, when applicable.

fix_status.description: Whether the bugfix agent resolved the failure.

tests_passing.description: Whether the test suite is green after the fix.

bugs_fixed.description: Count of distinct bugs the agent fixed.

tests_fixed.description: Count of failing tests the agent made pass.
